name: balance model action and revenue impact
input: Led end-to-end build and launch of an s-learner XGBoost incremental Balance Model
Driving $15M in annual incremental revenue through improved targeting precision.
expected: Led end-to-end build and launch of an s-learner XGBoost incremental Balance Model, driving $15M in annual incremental revenue through improved targeting precision.

name: feature discovery action and model impact
input: Developed a custom GPT-based Feature Discovery solution
Generating 10+ novel features to boost model performance for the high-spend decliners segment.
expected: Developed a custom GPT-based Feature Discovery solution, generating 10+ novel features to boost model performance for the high-spend decliners segment.
